description.en: Permanently increases your inventory capacity by 10 slots. Never leave loot behind again!
Celebrate your victories! Unleash a spectacular firework display that other players can see. Includes 5 different color variations.
Glide across the map with 40% increased movement speed. Features a neon-blue light trail that illuminates dark areas.
Grants double experience points for all activities for 30 minutes. Timer only ticks down while you are logged in.
Instantly restores 50% of your mana pool. Perfect for long dungeon raids. Can be used from the quick-slot menu.
A legendary shield forged in dragon fire. Provides a permanent +15 defense boost and a brilliant golden glow in-game.
